notifications.sessionExpired: Your Heatzy session has expired: please sign in again from the app settings.
notifications.sessionRestored: Your Heatzy session is active again.

authenticate.rejected: Heatzy rejected your credentials — please check them and sign in again.
authenticate.resetConfirm: This immediately signs you out and clears your saved Heatzy credentials.
